\tzpentry{ID5660}{Dphi Phase Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5660 introduces Dphi Phase Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} d\phi_i = n_i\,dt + \sigma_\phi\,dW_t, \end{equation}
